libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Do not use removed org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, or TypedProps APIs from the 1.1.5 tests. Cover the 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor artifact through classic ActorSystem/Actor/Props, serialization, configuration, dispatchers, event stream, coordinated shutdown, or utility APIs. If a test intentionally exercises Java serialization, configure that ActorSystem with pekko.actor.allow-java-serialization=on and pekko.actor.warn-about-java-serializer-usage=off. If a test intentionally exercises DNS default-name-server internals, it may need the existing JVM/native --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED flags; otherwise no global property is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Pekko documentation recommends pekko-actor-typed for new typed-actor code, but that is a separate artifact and should not be added just to fix coverage for pekko-actor_2.13.
Pekko 2.0.0-M1 removes many deprecated APIs; generated tests should be based on classes present in the 2.0.0-M1 jar, not copied from the 1.1.5 test set.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or global environment/system property is required for meaningful coverage of org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. The resolved artifact only brings scala-library and com.typesafe:config transitively; the observed failure is caused by tests using deprecated classic TypedActor APIs that were removed in Pekko 2.0.0-M1, not by missing setup.
